input.command:
echo "=== raise launcher window to front ==="
osascript <<'AS' 2>/dev/null
tell application "System Events"
  repeat with p in (every process whose name is "wine64-preloader")
    try
      repeat with w in (windows of p)
        if (name of w as string) contains "Homecoming" then
          set frontmost of p to true
          perform action "AXRaise" of w
          delay 0.5
          return "raised: " & (name of w) & "  frontmost proc set"
        end if
      end repeat
    end try
  end repeat
  return "no Homecoming window to raise"
end tell
AS
sleep 2
echo
echo "=== re-read window bounds (post-raise) ==="
osascript <<'AS' 2>/dev/null
tell application "System Events"
  repeat with p in (every process whose name is "wine64-preloader")
    try
      repeat with w in (windows of p)
        if (name of w as string) contains "Homecoming" then
          set {px, py} to position of w
          set {sw, sh} to size of w
          return "pos=" & px & "," & py & " size=" & sw & "x" & sh
        end if
      end repeat
    end try
  end repeat
end tell
AS
echo
echo "=== re-capture ==="
shot=/tmp/coh_launcher_shot2.png
screencapture -x -R115,112,1050,600 "$shot" 2>/dev/null && echo "saved $shot" || echo "capture failed"
